/home/moebius/eclipse2/target/x86_64/x86_64-linux-musl-cross/bin/x86_64-linux-musl-gcc -fPIC -O2 -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libbrotlidec.so.1 -o libbrotlidec.so.1.0.9 CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/bit_reader.c.o CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/decode.c.o CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/huffman.c.o CMakeFiles/brotlidec.dir/c/dec/state.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/moebius/eclipse2/tools/tinyx/deps-build-x86_64/brotli-build: libbrotlicommon.so.1.0.9
